english: Sustainer of the world-web, with a moving garland at his throat
Whose forehead shines like the autumn moon, the destroyer of great demons
Whose body is blue as the sky, whose Maya is difficult to cross
roman: Nabho nila kayam dura vara mayam

english: Who is accompanied by the beautiful Lakshmi — I worship, I worship
Most powerful among the gods, most revered in the three worlds
Dwelling in the village of the Guru, abiding in the ocean of existence
Whose three portions of arms — the remover of worldly bonds
Attentive to the devotion of his devotees — I worship, I worship
Whoever reads this hymn to the one resting in the milk ocean
roman: Idam yah pathet kshira shayis tavam yo

hindi: स याति विष्णोः परं धाम कृष्णं,
english: He goes to the supreme abode of Vishnu, Krishna
roman: Sa yati Vishno param dhaama Krishnam

english: And at the end, through merit, he attains joy together with Lakshmi
roman: Shriya sakam ante mudam chapi punyat
